title: Normal -> Insert -> Normal
summary: The mode transition every editing change goes through.

frames.caption: Normal mode. Cursor as a block on the space.
frames.narration: When you open a file, you start in Normal mode. Keystrokes are commands.

frames.caption: i then ', vim' — Insert mode, text added.
frames.narration: i enters Insert at the cursor; subsequent keys produce text. The status line below advertises the mode.

frames.caption: Esc — back to Normal mode.
frames.narration: Esc commits the insert and returns to Normal. The whole insertion is one undoable change.
